extortion.description: Insightin Health helps healthcare payers eliminate data silos and deliver highly satisfying consumer-centric experiences. inGAGE our software as a service (Saas) platform is the industry leading solution for quickly creating a connected data ecosystem. Using artificial intelligence and machine learning techniques, inGAGE leverages the totality of the connected data, in real-time, to produce insights that drive Next Best Action (NBA) recommendations to solve pressing healthcare challenges. inGAGE allows healthcare payers to deliver lifetime member value, driving growth and increasing overall plan profitability. company is headquartered in 333 W Ostend St. Suite 100 Baltimore, MD 21230.45 Employees. The total amount of data leakage is 378 GB
